mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_basic_user t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbBasicUserEntity.id},'%')
AND t.user_id like concat('%',#{kbBasicUserEntity.userId},'%')
AND t.b_id like concat('%',#{kbBasicUserEntity.bId},'%')
AND t.type like concat('%',#{kbBasicUserEntity.type},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbBasicUserEntity.createTime},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
select type,count(1) count from kb_basic_user where b_id = #{bid} and type in (1,3) group by type

select kb.id, kb.title, user.real_name as createName, kbu.create_time as expTime FROM kb_basic kb left join kb_basic_user kbu on kb.id = kbu.b_id left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = kb.auth where kb.is_deleted = 2 and user.is_deleted = 2 and user_id = #{userId} and type = 1 order by kbu.create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

select kb.id, kb.title, user.real_name as createName, kbu.create_time as expTime FROM kb_basic kb left join kb_basic_user kbu on kb.id = kbu.b_id left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = kb.auth where kb.is_deleted = 2 and user.is_deleted = 2 and user_id = #{userId} and type = 2 order by kbu.create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

select kb.id, kb.title, user.real_name as createName, kbu.create_time as expTime FROM kb_basic kb left join kb_basic_user kbu on kb.id = kbu.b_id left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = kb.auth where kb.is_deleted = 2 and user.is_deleted = 2 and user_id = #{userId} and type = 3 order by kbu.create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
select id from kb_basic order by rand() limit 16

select count(1) FROM kb_basic kb left join kb_basic_user kbu on kb.id = kbu.b_id left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = kb.auth where kb.is_deleted = 2 and user.is_deleted = 2 and user_id = #{userId} and type = 3

select count(1) FROM kb_basic kb left join kb_basic_user kbu on kb.id = kbu.b_id left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = kb.auth where kb.is_deleted = 2 and user.is_deleted = 2 and user_id = #{userId} and type = 2

select count(1) FROM kb_basic kb left join kb_basic_user kbu on kb.id = kbu.b_id left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = kb.auth where kb.is_deleted = 2 and user.is_deleted = 2 and user_id = #{userId} and type = 1
select count(1) as uploadCount from( SELECT DISTINCT b_id from kb_basic_user kbu left join kb_basic kb on kbu.b_id = kb.id where type = 2 and kb.auth = #{userId} and kb.is_deleted = 2) t1
